sources.name: Construction Output in Great Britain (CGBR) — TODO v2
sources.series: VABQ — All work, current prices, seasonally adjusted (£ million)
sources.note: ONS publishes this as XLSX only; no stable CSV/JSON endpoint available as of 2026-06. Second series slot is reserved; web layer renders gracefully when construction_output is null.

meta.attribution: UK Construction Index data compiled from Companies House public records (Open Government Licence v3.0). Free to cite with attribution to Trade Tax Specialists.
meta.notes: Incorporation counts are gross (dissolved companies remain on the register; no survivorship bias). Union is the deduplicated count across all 19 construction SIC codes -- a company registering multiple SIC codes from the set is counted once. The most recent 2 months are provisional (Companies House indexing lag) and are excluded from headline figures and decade comparisons.

construction_output.series: VABQ — All construction output, current prices, SA (ONS CGBR)
construction_output.note: ONS publishes this data as XLSX only (no stable CSV or JSON endpoint available 2026-06). Monthly series will be populated in a future ingest pass once a machine-readable feed is available.
